task: Turn off the desk lamp by pressing the button
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A desk lamp with a blue shade and a white base is on a green patterned surface. The lamp has a switch/button on its white base. STRATEGY - Reach the lamp base, press the switch/button to turn it off. Failure mode: misidentifying the switch/button. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the lamp base; Step 2 grasp the base for stability; Step 3 press the switch/button.**
Goal: off(desk_lamp)
Scene: desk_lamp
Step 1: reach(desk_lamp)
  affordance_region: the white base of the desk lamp
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, desk_lamp, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, desk_lamp) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(desk_lamp)
  affordance_region: the white base of the desk lamp
  contact: holding(desk_lamp) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(desk_lamp)
Step 3: push(desk_lamp)
  affordance_region: the switch/button on the white base of the desk lamp
  contact: pressed(desk_lamp_switch) [completion]
  direction: press_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: pressed(desk_lamp_switch)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the white base of the desk lamp
the white base of the desk lamp
the switch/button on the white base of the desk lamp
